stemHtml: Which of the following options is true regarding steel brakes in comparison to carbon brakes?

options.a: Their wear is proportional to brake pressure rather than number of applications.
options.b: A pilot should not apply the brakes as many times as with carbon brakes.
options.c: Steel brakes have a higher friction coefficient than carbon brakes.
options.d: Steel brakes have a longer service life than carbon brakes.
